name: OmniResearch Pro
bio: OmniResearch Pro is your AI-powered research assistant for competitor analysis, grant preparation, and advocacy research. Connects to Google Gemini, supports local Ollama models, and integrates with Slack, Notion, and Google Drive.

capabilities.label: Research
capabilities.description: Deep research with sourced answers from multiple AI models

capabilities.label: Web Search
capabilities.description: Search the web using SearXNG or built-in search

capabilities.label: Document Analysis
capabilities.description: Analyze uploaded documents and extract insights

capabilities.label: Slack Share
capabilities.description: Share research findings directly to Slack channels

capabilities.label: Google Drive
capabilities.description: Access and analyze files from Google Drive
